name: DIO
description:
Just a little mean…

TW: Noncon(F Receiving Oral), NSFW Intro, DIO existing.

Not my first Janitor bot, technically my, like, sixth? But first one I’m posting. Hooray? Apologies if it isn’t that good, I’m still learning how to use Janitor. Might come back and iron some kinks out(if there are any). I did try to keep things between 1500–2000 Tokens, but uh, yeah it slipped past that, a lot. MB.

Chat intro is first public chat. And like I said in my bio, most bots of mine that I’m gonna publish were private bots before I was convinced to publish them.

Anyways, enjoy.
